statement: theorem mellin_convergent_of_isBigO_scalar {a b : ℝ} {f : ℝ → ℝ} {s : ℝ} (hfc : LocallyIntegrableOn f <| Ioi 0) (hf_top : f =O[atTop] (· ^ (-a))) (hs_top : s < a) (hf_bot : f =O[𝓝[>] 0] (· ^ (-b))) (hs_bot : b < s) : IntegrableOn (fun t : ℝ => t ^ (s - 1) * f t) (Ioi 0)
proof:
obtain ⟨c1, hc1, hc1'⟩ := mellin_convergent_top_of_isBigO hfc.aestronglyMeasurable hf_top hs_top
obtain ⟨c2, hc2, hc2'⟩ :=
mellin_convergent_zero_of_isBigO hfc.aestronglyMeasurable hf_bot hs_bot
have : Ioi 0 = Ioc 0 c2 ∪ Ioc c2 c1 ∪ Ioi c1 := by
rw [union_assoc, Ioc_union_Ioi (le_max_right _ _),
Ioc_union_Ioi ((min_le_left _ _).trans (le_max_right _ _)), min_eq_left (lt_min hc2 hc1).le]
rw [this, integrableOn_union, integrableOn_union]
refine ⟨⟨hc2', Iff.mp integrableOn_Icc_iff_integrableOn_Ioc ?_⟩, hc1'⟩
refine
(hfc.continuousOn_mul ?_ isOpen_Ioi.isLocallyClosed).integrableOn_compact_subset
(fun t ht => (hc2.trans_le ht.1 : 0 < t)) isCompact_Icc
exact continuousOn_of_forall_continuousAt
fun t ht ↦ continuousAt_rpow_const _ _ <| Or.inl <| ne_of_gt ht

name: mellinConvergent_of_isBigO_rpow
statement: theorem mellinConvergent_of_isBigO_rpow [NormedSpace ℂ E] {a b : ℝ} {f : ℝ → E} {s : ℂ} (hfc : LocallyIntegrableOn f <| Ioi 0) (hf_top : f =O[atTop] (· ^ (-a))) (hs_top : s.re < a) (hf_bot : f =O[𝓝[>] 0] (· ^ (-b))) (hs_bot : b < s.re) : MellinConvergent f s
proof:
rw [MellinConvergent,
mellin_convergent_iff_norm Subset.rfl measurableSet_Ioi hfc.aestronglyMeasurable]
exact mellin_convergent_of_isBigO_scalar hfc.norm hf_top.norm_left hs_top hf_bot.norm_left hs_bot

name: isBigO_rpow_top_log_smul
statement: theorem isBigO_rpow_top_log_smul [NormedSpace ℝ E] {a b : ℝ} {f : ℝ → E} (hab : b < a) (hf : f =O[atTop] (· ^ (-a))) : (fun t : ℝ => log t • f t) =O[atTop] (· ^ (-b))
proof:
refine
((isLittleO_log_rpow_atTop (sub_pos.mpr hab)).isBigO.smul hf).congr'
(Eventually.of_forall fun t => by rfl)
((eventually_gt_atTop 0).mp (Eventually.of_forall fun t ht => ?_))
simp only
rw [smul_eq_mul, ← rpow_add ht, ← sub_eq_add_neg, sub_eq_add_neg a, add_sub_cancel_left]

name: isBigO_rpow_zero_log_smul
statement: theorem isBigO_rpow_zero_log_smul [NormedSpace ℝ E] {a b : ℝ} {f : ℝ → E} (hab : a < b) (hf : f =O[𝓝[>] 0] (· ^ (-a))) : (fun t : ℝ => log t • f t) =O[𝓝[>] 0] (· ^ (-b))
proof:
have : log =o[𝓝[>] 0] fun t : ℝ => t ^ (a - b) := by
refine ((isLittleO_log_rpow_atTop (sub_pos.mpr hab)).neg_left.comp_tendsto
tendsto_inv_nhdsGT_zero).congr'
(.of_forall fun t => ?_)
(eventually_mem_nhdsWithin.mono fun t ht => ?_)
· simp
· simp_rw [Function.comp_apply, inv_rpow (le_of_lt ht), ← rpow_neg (le_of_lt ht), neg_sub]
refine (this.isBigO.smul hf).congr' (Eventually.of_forall fun t => by rfl)
(eventually_nhdsWithin_iff.mpr (Eventually.of_forall fun t ht => ?_))
simp_rw [smul_eq_mul, ← rpow_add ht]
congr 1
abel

name: mellin_hasDerivAt_of_isBigO_rpow
statement: theorem mellin_hasDerivAt_of_isBigO_rpow [NormedSpace ℂ E] {a b : ℝ} {f : ℝ → E} {s : ℂ} (hfc : LocallyIntegrableOn f (Ioi 0)) (hf_top : f =O[atTop] (· ^ (-a))) (hs_top : s.re < a) (hf_bot : f =O[𝓝[>] 0] (· ^ (-b))) (hs_bot : b < s.re) : MellinConvergent (fun t => log t • f t) s ∧ HasDerivAt (mellin f) (mellin (fun t => log t • f t) s) s
proof:
set F : ℂ → ℝ → E := fun (z : ℂ) (t : ℝ) => (t : ℂ) ^ (z - 1) • f t
set F' : ℂ → ℝ → E := fun (z : ℂ) (t : ℝ) => ((t : ℂ) ^ (z - 1) * log t) • f t
-- A convenient radius of ball within which we can uniformly bound the derivative.
obtain ⟨v, hv0, hv1, hv2⟩ : ∃ v : ℝ, 0 < v ∧ v < s.re - b ∧ v < a - s.re := by
obtain ⟨w, hw1, hw2⟩ := exists_between (sub_pos.mpr hs_top)
obtain ⟨w', hw1', hw2'⟩ := exists_between (sub_pos.mpr hs_bot)
exact
⟨min w w', lt_min hw1 hw1', (min_le_right _ _).trans_lt hw2', (min_le_left _ _).trans_lt hw2⟩
let bound : ℝ → ℝ := fun t : ℝ => (t ^ (s.re + v - 1) + t ^ (s.re - v - 1)) * |log t| * ‖f t‖
have h1 : ∀ᶠ z : ℂ in 𝓝 s, AEStronglyMeasurable (F z) (volume.restrict <| Ioi 0) := by
refine Eventually.of_forall fun z => AEStronglyMeasurable.smul ?_ hfc.aestronglyMeasurable
refine ContinuousOn.aestronglyMeasurable ?_ measurableSet_Ioi
refine continuousOn_of_forall_continuousAt fun t ht => ?_
exact continuousAt_ofReal_cpow_const _ _ (Or.inr <| ne_of_gt ht)
have h2 : IntegrableOn (F s) (Ioi (0 : ℝ)) := by
exact mellinConvergent_of_isBigO_rpow hfc hf_top hs_top hf_bot hs_bot
have h3 : AEStronglyMeasurable (F' s) (volume.restrict <| Ioi 0) := by
apply LocallyIntegrableOn.aestronglyMeasurable
refine hfc.continuousOn_smul isOpen_Ioi.isLocallyClosed
((continuousOn_of_forall_continuousAt fun t ht => ?_).mul ?_)
· exact continuousAt_ofReal_cpow_const _ _ (Or.inr <| ne_of_gt ht)
· refine continuous_ofReal.comp_continuousOn ?_
exact continuousOn_log.mono (subset_compl_singleton_iff.mpr self_notMem_Ioi)
have h4 : ∀ᵐ t : ℝ ∂volume.restrict (Ioi 0),
∀ z : ℂ, z ∈ Metric.ball s v → ‖F' z t‖ ≤ bound t := by
refine (ae_restrict_mem measurableSet_Ioi).mono fun t ht z hz => ?_
simp_rw [F', bound, norm_smul, norm_mul, norm_real, mul_assoc, norm_eq_abs]
gcongr
rw [norm_cpow_eq_rpow_re_of_pos ht]
rcases le_or_gt 1 t with h | h
· refine le_add_of_le_of_nonneg (rpow_le_rpow_of_exponent_le h ?_)
(by positivity)
rw [sub_re, one_re, sub_le_sub_iff_right]
rw [mem_ball_iff_norm] at hz
have hz' := (re_le_norm _).trans hz.le
rwa [sub_re, sub_le_iff_le_add'] at hz'
· refine
le_add_of_nonneg_of_le (rpow_pos_of_pos ht _).le (rpow_le_rpow_of_exponent_ge ht h.le ?_)
rw [sub_re, one_re, sub_le_iff_le_add, sub_add_cancel]
rw [mem_ball_iff_norm'] at hz
have hz' := (re_le_norm _).trans hz.le
rwa [sub_re, sub_le_iff_le_add, ← sub_le_iff_le_add'] at hz'
have h5 : IntegrableOn bound (Ioi 0) := by
simp_rw [bound, add_mul, mul_assoc]
suffices ∀ {j : ℝ}, b < j → j < a →
IntegrableOn (fun t : ℝ => t ^ (j - 1) * (|log t| * ‖f t‖)) (Ioi 0) volume by
refine Integrable.add (this ?_ ?_) (this ?_ ?_)
all_goals linarith
· intro j hj hj'
obtain ⟨w, hw1, hw2⟩ := exists_between hj
obtain ⟨w', hw1', hw2'⟩ := exists_between hj'
refine mellin_convergent_of_isBigO_scalar ?_ ?_ hw1' ?_ hw2
· simp_rw [mul_comm]
refine hfc.norm.mul_continuousOn ?_ isOpen_Ioi.isLocallyClosed
refine Continuous.comp_continuousOn _root_.continuous_abs (continuousOn_log.mono ?_)
exact subset_compl_singleton_iff.mpr self_notMem_Ioi
· refine (isBigO_rpow_top_log_smul hw2' hf_top).norm_left.congr_left fun t ↦ ?_
simp only [norm_smul, Real.norm_eq_abs]
· refine (isBigO_rpow_zero_log_smul hw1 hf_bot).norm_left.congr_left fun t ↦ ?_
simp only [norm_smul, Real.norm_eq_abs]
have h6 : ∀ᵐ t : ℝ ∂volume.restrict (Ioi 0),
∀ y : ℂ, y ∈ Metric.ball s v → HasDerivAt (fun z : ℂ => F z t) (F' y t) y := by
refine (ae_restrict_mem measurableSet_Ioi).mono fun t ht y _ => ?_
have ht' : (t : ℂ) ≠ 0 := ofReal_ne_zero.mpr (ne_of_gt ht)
have u1 : HasDerivAt (fun z : ℂ => (t : ℂ) ^ (z - 1)) (t ^ (y - 1) * log t) y := by
convert ((hasDerivAt_id' y).sub_const 1).const_cpow (Or.inl ht') using 1
rw [ofReal_log (le_of_lt ht)]
ring
exact u1.smul_const (f t)
have main :=
hasDerivAt_integral_of_dominated_loc_of_deriv_le (Metric.ball_mem_nhds _ hv0) h1 h2 h3 h4 h5 h6
simpa only [F', mul_smul] using main

name: mellin_differentiableAt_of_isBigO_rpow
statement: theorem mellin_differentiableAt_of_isBigO_rpow [NormedSpace ℂ E] {a b : ℝ} {f : ℝ → E} {s : ℂ} (hfc : LocallyIntegrableOn f <| Ioi 0) (hf_top : f =O[atTop] (· ^ (-a))) (hs_top : s.re < a) (hf_bot : f =O[𝓝[>] 0] (· ^ (-b))) (hs_bot : b < s.re) : DifferentiableAt ℂ (mellin f) s :=

name: mellinConvergent_of_isBigO_rpow_exp
statement: theorem mellinConvergent_of_isBigO_rpow_exp [NormedSpace ℂ E] {a b : ℝ} (ha : 0 < a) {f : ℝ → E} {s : ℂ} (hfc : LocallyIntegrableOn f <| Ioi 0) (hf_top : f =O[atTop] fun t => exp (-a * t)) (hf_bot : f =O[𝓝[>] 0] (· ^ (-b))) (hs_bot : b < s.re) : MellinConvergent f s :=

name: mellin_differentiableAt_of_isBigO_rpow_exp
statement: theorem mellin_differentiableAt_of_isBigO_rpow_exp [NormedSpace ℂ E] {a b : ℝ} (ha : 0 < a) {f : ℝ → E} {s : ℂ} (hfc : LocallyIntegrableOn f <| Ioi 0) (hf_top : f =O[atTop] fun t => exp (-a * t)) (hf_bot : f =O[𝓝[>] 0] (· ^ (-b))) (hs_bot : b < s.re) : DifferentiableAt ℂ (mellin f) s :=

name: hasMellin_one_Ioc
statement: theorem hasMellin_one_Ioc {s : ℂ} (hs : 0 < re s) : HasMellin (indicator (Ioc 0 1) (fun _ => 1 : ℝ → ℂ)) s (1 / s)
proof:
have aux1 : -1 < (s - 1).re := by
simpa only [sub_re, one_re, sub_eq_add_neg] using lt_add_of_pos_left _ hs
have aux2 : s ≠ 0 := by contrapose! hs; rw [hs, zero_re]
have aux3 : MeasurableSet (Ioc (0 : ℝ) 1) := measurableSet_Ioc
simp_rw [HasMellin, mellin, MellinConvergent, ← indicator_smul, IntegrableOn,
integrable_indicator_iff aux3, smul_eq_mul, integral_indicator aux3, mul_one, IntegrableOn,
Measure.restrict_restrict_of_subset Ioc_subset_Ioi_self]
rw [← IntegrableOn, ← intervalIntegrable_iff_integrableOn_Ioc_of_le zero_le_one]
refine ⟨intervalIntegral.intervalIntegrable_cpow' aux1, ?_⟩
rw [← intervalIntegral.integral_of_le zero_le_one, integral_cpow (Or.inl aux1), sub_add_cancel,
ofReal_zero, ofReal_one, one_cpow, zero_cpow aux2, sub_zero]

name: hasMellin_cpow_Ioc
statement: theorem hasMellin_cpow_Ioc (a : ℂ) {s : ℂ} (hs : 0 < re s + re a) : HasMellin (indicator (Ioc 0 1) (fun t => ↑t ^ a : ℝ → ℂ)) s (1 / (s + a))
proof:
have := hasMellin_one_Ioc (by rwa [add_re] : 0 < (s + a).re)
simp_rw [HasMellin, ← MellinConvergent.cpow_smul, ← mellin_cpow_smul, ← indicator_smul,
smul_eq_mul, mul_one] at this
exact this

name: oscillationWithin_nhds_eq_oscillation
statement: theorem oscillationWithin_nhds_eq_oscillation [TopologicalSpace E] (f : E → F) (D : Set E) (x : E) (hD : D ∈ 𝓝 x) : oscillationWithin f D x = oscillation f x

name: oscillationWithin_univ_eq_oscillation
statement: theorem oscillationWithin_univ_eq_oscillation [TopologicalSpace E] (f : E → F) (x : E) : oscillationWithin f univ x = oscillation f x :=

name: oscillationWithin_eq_zero
statement: theorem oscillationWithin_eq_zero [TopologicalSpace E] {f : E → F} {D : Set E} {x : E} (hf : ContinuousWithinAt f D x) : oscillationWithin f D x = 0
proof:
rw [← nonpos_iff_eq_zero]
refine _root_.le_of_forall_pos_le_add fun ε hε ↦ ?_
rw [zero_add]
have : eball (f x) (ε / 2) ∈ (𝓝[D] x).map f :=
hf <| eball_mem_nhds _ (by simp [ne_of_gt hε])
refine (biInf_le ediam this).trans (le_of_le_of_eq ediam_eball_le ?_)
exact (ENNReal.mul_div_cancel (by simp) (by simp))

name: oscillation_eq_zero
statement: theorem oscillation_eq_zero [TopologicalSpace E] {f : E → F} {x : E} (hf : ContinuousAt f x) : oscillation f x = 0
proof:
rw [← continuousWithinAt_univ f x] at hf
exact oscillationWithin_univ_eq_oscillation f x ▸ hf.oscillationWithin_eq_zero

name: eq_zero_iff_continuousWithinAt
statement: theorem eq_zero_iff_continuousWithinAt [TopologicalSpace E] (f : E → F) {D : Set E} {x : E} (xD : x ∈ D) : oscillationWithin f D x = 0 ↔ ContinuousWithinAt f D x
proof:
refine ⟨fun hf ↦ EMetric.tendsto_nhds.mpr (fun ε ε0 ↦ ?_), fun hf ↦ hf.oscillationWithin_eq_zero⟩
simp_rw [← hf, oscillationWithin, iInf_lt_iff] at ε0
obtain ⟨S, hS, Sε⟩ := ε0
refine Filter.mem_of_superset hS (fun y hy ↦ lt_of_le_of_lt ?_ Sε)
exact edist_le_ediam_of_mem (mem_preimage.1 hy) <| mem_preimage.1 (mem_of_mem_nhdsWithin xD hS)

name: eq_zero_iff_continuousAt
statement: theorem eq_zero_iff_continuousAt [TopologicalSpace E] (f : E → F) (x : E) : oscillation f x = 0 ↔ ContinuousAt f x
proof:
rw [← oscillationWithin_univ_eq_oscillation, ← continuousWithinAt_univ f x]
exact OscillationWithin.eq_zero_iff_continuousWithinAt f (mem_univ x)

name: uniform_oscillationWithin
statement: theorem uniform_oscillationWithin (comp : IsCompact K) (hK : ∀ x ∈ K, oscillationWithin f D x < ε) : ∃ δ > 0, ∀ x ∈ K, ediam (f '' (eball x (ENNReal.ofReal δ) ∩ D)) ≤ ε
proof:
let S := fun r ↦
{x : E | ∃ (a : ℝ), (a > r ∧ ediam (f '' (eball x (ENNReal.ofReal a) ∩ D)) ≤ ε)}
have S_open : ∀ r > 0, IsOpen (S r) := by
refine fun r _ ↦ EMetric.isOpen_iff.mpr fun x ⟨a, ar, ha⟩ ↦
⟨ENNReal.ofReal ((a - r) / 2), by simp [ar], ?_⟩
refine fun y hy ↦ ⟨a - (a - r) / 2, by linarith,
le_trans (ediam_mono (image_mono fun z hz ↦ ?_)) ha⟩
refine ⟨lt_of_le_of_lt (edist_triangle z y x) (lt_of_lt_of_eq (ENNReal.add_lt_add hz.1 hy) ?_),
hz.2⟩
rw [← ofReal_add (by linarith) (by linarith), sub_add_cancel]
have S_cover : K ⊆ ⋃ r > 0, S r := by
intro x hx
have : oscillationWithin f D x < ε := hK x hx
simp only [oscillationWithin, Filter.mem_map, iInf_lt_iff] at this
obtain ⟨n, hn₁, hn₂⟩ := this
obtain ⟨r, r0, hr⟩ := EMetric.mem_nhdsWithin_iff.1 hn₁
simp only [gt_iff_lt, mem_iUnion, exists_prop]
have : ∀ r', (ENNReal.ofReal r') ≤ r →
ediam (f '' (eball x (ENNReal.ofReal r') ∩ D)) ≤ ε := by
intro r' hr'
grw [← hn₂, ← image_subset_iff.2 hr, hr']
by_cases r_top : r = ⊤
· exact ⟨1, one_pos, 2, by simp, this 2 (by simp only [r_top, le_top])⟩
· obtain ⟨r', hr'⟩ := exists_between (toReal_pos (ne_of_gt r0) r_top)
use r', hr'.1, r.toReal, hr'.2, this r.toReal ofReal_toReal_le
have S_antitone : ∀ (r₁ r₂ : ℝ), r₁ ≤ r₂ → S r₂ ⊆ S r₁ :=
fun r₁ r₂ hr x ⟨a, ar₂, ha⟩ ↦ ⟨a, lt_of_le_of_lt hr ar₂, ha⟩
obtain ⟨δ, δ0, hδ⟩ : ∃ r > 0, K ⊆ S r := by
obtain ⟨T, Tb, Tfin, hT⟩ := comp.elim_finite_subcover_image S_open S_cover
by_cases T_nonempty : T.Nonempty
· use Tfin.isWF.min T_nonempty, Tb (Tfin.isWF.min_mem T_nonempty)
intro x hx
obtain ⟨r, hr⟩ := mem_iUnion.1 (hT hx)
simp only [mem_iUnion, exists_prop] at hr
exact (S_antitone _ r (IsWF.min_le Tfin.isWF T_nonempty hr.1)) hr.2
· rw [not_nonempty_iff_eq_empty] at T_nonempty
use 1, one_pos, subset_trans hT (by simp [T_nonempty])
use δ, δ0
intro x xK
obtain ⟨a, δa, ha⟩ := hδ xK
grw [← ha]
gcongr

name: uniform_oscillation
statement: theorem uniform_oscillation {K : Set E} (comp : IsCompact K) {f : E → F} {ε : ENNReal} (hK : ∀ x ∈ K, oscillation f x < ε) : ∃ δ > 0, ∀ x ∈ K, ediam (f '' (eball x (ENNReal.ofReal δ))) ≤ ε
proof:
simp only [← oscillationWithin_univ_eq_oscillation] at hK
convert ← comp.uniform_oscillationWithin hK
exact inter_univ _

name: sum_Ico_le_integral_of_le
statement: lemma sum_Ico_le_integral_of_le (hab : a ≤ b) (h : ∀ i ∈ Ico a b, ∀ x ∈ Ico (i : ℝ) (i + 1 : ℕ), f i ≤ g x) (hg : IntegrableOn g (Set.Ico a b)) : ∑ i ∈ Finset.Ico a b, f i ≤ ∫ x in a..b, g x
proof:
have A i (hi : i ∈ Finset.Ico a b) : IntervalIntegrable g volume i (i + 1 : ℕ) := by
rw [intervalIntegrable_iff_integrableOn_Ico_of_le (by simp)]
apply hg.mono _ le_rfl
rintro x ⟨hx, h'x⟩
simp only [Finset.mem_Ico, mem_Ico] at hi ⊢
exact ⟨le_trans (mod_cast hi.1) hx, h'x.trans_le (mod_cast hi.2)⟩
calc
∑ i ∈ Finset.Ico a b, f i
_ = ∑ i ∈ Finset.Ico a b, (∫ x in (i : ℝ)..(i + 1 : ℕ), f i) := by simp
_ ≤ ∑ i ∈ Finset.Ico a b, (∫ x in (i : ℝ)..(i + 1 : ℕ), g x) := by
gcongr with i hi
apply intervalIntegral.integral_mono_on_of_le_Ioo (by simp) (by simp) (A _ hi) (fun x hx ↦ ?_)
exact h _ (by simpa using hi) _ (Ioo_subset_Ico_self hx)
_ = ∫ x in a..b, g x := by
rw [intervalIntegral.sum_integral_adjacent_intervals_Ico (a := fun i ↦ i) hab]
intro i hi
exact A _ (by simpa using hi)

name: integral_le_sum_Ico_of_le
statement: lemma integral_le_sum_Ico_of_le (hab : a ≤ b) (h : ∀ i ∈ Ico a b, ∀ x ∈ Ico (i : ℝ) (i + 1 : ℕ), g x ≤ f i) (hg : IntegrableOn g (Set.Ico a b)) : ∫ x in a..b, g x ≤ ∑ i ∈ Finset.Ico a b, f i
proof:
convert neg_le_neg (sum_Ico_le_integral_of_le (f := -f) (g := -g) hab
(fun i hi x hx ↦ neg_le_neg (h i hi x hx)) hg.neg) <;> simp

name: AntitoneOn.integral_le_sum
statement: theorem AntitoneOn.integral_le_sum (hf : AntitoneOn f (Icc x₀ (x₀ + a))) : (∫ x in x₀..x₀ + a, f x) ≤ ∑ i ∈ Finset.range a, f (x₀ + i)
proof:
have hint : ∀ k : ℕ, k < a → IntervalIntegrable f volume (x₀ + k) (x₀ + (k + 1 : ℕ)) := by
intro k hk
refine (hf.mono ?_).intervalIntegrable
rw [uIcc_of_le]
· apply Icc_subset_Icc
· simp only [le_add_iff_nonneg_right, Nat.cast_nonneg]
· simp only [add_le_add_iff_left, Nat.cast_le, Nat.succ_le_of_lt hk]
· simp only [add_le_add_iff_left, Nat.cast_le, Nat.le_succ]
calc
∫ x in x₀..x₀ + a, f x = ∑ i ∈ Finset.range a, ∫ x in x₀ + i..x₀ + (i + 1 : ℕ), f x := by
convert (intervalIntegral.sum_integral_adjacent_intervals hint).symm
simp only [Nat.cast_zero, add_zero]
_ ≤ ∑ i ∈ Finset.range a, ∫ _ in x₀ + i..x₀ + (i + 1 : ℕ), f (x₀ + i) := by
gcongr with i hi
have ia : i < a := Finset.mem_range.1 hi
refine intervalIntegral.integral_mono_on (by simp) (hint _ ia) (by simp) fun x hx => ?_
apply hf _ _ hx.1
· simp only [ia.le, mem_Icc, le_add_iff_nonneg_right, Nat.cast_nonneg, add_le_add_iff_left,
Nat.cast_le, and_self_iff]
· refine mem_Icc.2 ⟨le_trans (by simp) hx.1, le_trans hx.2 ?_⟩
simp only [add_le_add_iff_left, Nat.cast_le, Nat.succ_le_of_lt ia]
_ = ∑ i ∈ Finset.range a, f (x₀ + i) := by simp

name: AntitoneOn.integral_le_sum_Ico
statement: theorem AntitoneOn.integral_le_sum_Ico (hab : a ≤ b) (hf : AntitoneOn f (Set.Icc a b)) : (∫ x in a..b, f x) ≤ ∑ x ∈ Finset.Ico a b, f x
proof:
rw [(Nat.sub_add_cancel hab).symm, Nat.cast_add]
conv =>
congr
congr
· skip
· skip
rw [add_comm]
· skip
· skip
congr
congr
rw [← zero_add a]
rw [← Finset.sum_Ico_add, Nat.Ico_zero_eq_range]
conv =>
rhs
congr
· skip
ext
rw [Nat.cast_add]
apply AntitoneOn.integral_le_sum
simp only [hf, hab, Nat.cast_sub, add_sub_cancel]

name: AntitoneOn.sum_le_integral
statement: theorem AntitoneOn.sum_le_integral (hf : AntitoneOn f (Icc x₀ (x₀ + a))) : (∑ i ∈ Finset.range a, f (x₀ + (i + 1 : ℕ))) ≤ ∫ x in x₀..x₀ + a, f x
proof:
have hint : ∀ k : ℕ, k < a → IntervalIntegrable f volume (x₀ + k) (x₀ + (k + 1 : ℕ)) := by
intro k hk
refine (hf.mono ?_).intervalIntegrable
rw [uIcc_of_le]
· apply Icc_subset_Icc
· simp only [le_add_iff_nonneg_right, Nat.cast_nonneg]
· simp only [add_le_add_iff_left, Nat.cast_le, Nat.succ_le_of_lt hk]
· simp only [add_le_add_iff_left, Nat.cast_le, Nat.le_succ]
calc
(∑ i ∈ Finset.range a, f (x₀ + (i + 1 : ℕ))) =
∑ i ∈ Finset.range a, ∫ _ in x₀ + i..x₀ + (i + 1 : ℕ), f (x₀ + (i + 1 : ℕ)) := by simp
_ ≤ ∑ i ∈ Finset.range a, ∫ x in x₀ + i..x₀ + (i + 1 : ℕ), f x := by
apply Finset.sum_le_sum fun i hi => ?_
have ia : i + 1 ≤ a := Finset.mem_range.1 hi
refine intervalIntegral.integral_mono_on (by simp) (by simp) (hint _ ia) fun x hx => ?_
apply hf _ _ hx.2
· refine mem_Icc.2 ⟨le_trans (le_add_of_nonneg_right (Nat.cast_nonneg _)) hx.1,
le_trans hx.2 ?_⟩
simp only [Nat.cast_le, add_le_add_iff_left, ia]
· refine mem_Icc.2 ⟨le_add_of_nonneg_right (Nat.cast_nonneg _), ?_⟩
simp only [add_le_add_iff_left, Nat.cast_le, ia]
_ = ∫ x in x₀..x₀ + a, f x := by
convert intervalIntegral.sum_integral_adjacent_intervals hint
simp only [Nat.cast_zero, add_zero]

name: AntitoneOn.sum_le_integral_Ico
statement: theorem AntitoneOn.sum_le_integral_Ico (hab : a ≤ b) (hf : AntitoneOn f (Set.Icc a b)) : (∑ i ∈ Finset.Ico a b, f (i + 1 : ℕ)) ≤ ∫ x in a..b, f x
proof:
rw [(Nat.sub_add_cancel hab).symm, Nat.cast_add]
conv =>
congr
congr
congr
rw [← zero_add a]
· skip
· skip
· skip
rw [add_comm]
rw [← Finset.sum_Ico_add, Nat.Ico_zero_eq_range]
conv =>
lhs
congr
congr
· skip
ext
rw [add_assoc, Nat.cast_add]
apply AntitoneOn.sum_le_integral
simp only [hf, hab, Nat.cast_sub, add_sub_cancel]

name: MonotoneOn.sum_le_integral
statement: theorem MonotoneOn.sum_le_integral (hf : MonotoneOn f (Icc x₀ (x₀ + a))) : (∑ i ∈ Finset.range a, f (x₀ + i)) ≤ ∫ x in x₀..x₀ + a, f x
proof:
rw [← neg_le_neg_iff, ← Finset.sum_neg_distrib, ← intervalIntegral.integral_neg]
exact hf.neg.integral_le_sum

name: MonotoneOn.sum_le_integral_Ico
statement: theorem MonotoneOn.sum_le_integral_Ico (hab : a ≤ b) (hf : MonotoneOn f (Set.Icc a b)) : ∑ x ∈ Finset.Ico a b, f x ≤ ∫ x in a..b, f x
proof:
rw [← neg_le_neg_iff, ← Finset.sum_neg_distrib, ← intervalIntegral.integral_neg]
exact hf.neg.integral_le_sum_Ico hab

name: MonotoneOn.integral_le_sum
statement: theorem MonotoneOn.integral_le_sum (hf : MonotoneOn f (Icc x₀ (x₀ + a))) : (∫ x in x₀..x₀ + a, f x) ≤ ∑ i ∈ Finset.range a, f (x₀ + (i + 1 : ℕ))
proof:
rw [← neg_le_neg_iff, ← Finset.sum_neg_distrib, ← intervalIntegral.integral_neg]
exact hf.neg.sum_le_integral

name: MonotoneOn.integral_le_sum_Ico
statement: theorem MonotoneOn.integral_le_sum_Ico (hab : a ≤ b) (hf : MonotoneOn f (Set.Icc a b)) : (∫ x in a..b, f x) ≤ ∑ i ∈ Finset.Ico a b, f (i + 1 : ℕ)
proof:
rw [← neg_le_neg_iff, ← Finset.sum_neg_distrib, ← intervalIntegral.integral_neg]
exact hf.neg.sum_le_integral_Ico hab

name: sum_mul_Ico_le_integral_of_monotone_antitone
statement: lemma sum_mul_Ico_le_integral_of_monotone_antitone (hab : a ≤ b) (hf : MonotoneOn f (Icc a b)) (hg : AntitoneOn g (Icc (a - 1) (b - 1))) (fpos : 0 ≤ f a) (gpos : 0 ≤ g (b - 1)) : ∑ i ∈ Finset.Ico a b, f i * g i ≤ ∫ x in a..b, f x * g (x - 1)
proof:
apply sum_Ico_le_integral_of_le (f := fun x ↦ f x * g x) hab
· intro i hi x hx
simp only [Nat.cast_add, Nat.cast_one, mem_Ico] at hx hi
have I0 : (i : ℝ) ≤ b - 1 := by
simp only [le_sub_iff_add_le]
norm_cast
lia
have I1 : (i : ℝ) ∈ Icc (a - 1 : ℝ) (b - 1) := by
simp only [mem_Icc, tsub_le_iff_right]
exact ⟨by norm_cast; lia, I0⟩
have I2 : x ∈ Icc (a : ℝ) b := by
refine ⟨le_trans (mod_cast hi.1) hx.1, hx.2.le.trans ?_⟩
norm_cast
lia
apply mul_le_mul
· apply hf
· simp only [mem_Icc, Nat.cast_le]
exact ⟨hi.1, hi.2.le⟩
· exact I2
· exact hx.1
· apply hg
· simp only [mem_Icc, tsub_le_iff_right, sub_add_cancel]
refine ⟨le_trans (mod_cast hi.1) hx.1, hx.2.le.trans ?_⟩
norm_cast
lia
· exact I1
· simpa [sub_le_iff_le_add] using hx.2.le
· apply gpos.trans
apply hg I1 (by simp [hab]) I0
· apply fpos.trans
apply hf (by simp [hab]) I2
exact le_trans (mod_cast hi.1) hx.1
· apply Integrable.mono_measure _ (Measure.restrict_mono_set _ Ico_subset_Icc_self)
apply Integrable.mul_of_top_left
· exact hf.integrableOn_isCompact isCompact_Icc
· apply AntitoneOn.memLp_isCompact isCompact_Icc
intro x hx y hy hxy
apply hg
· simpa using hx
· simpa using hy
· simpa using hxy

name: integral_le_sum_mul_Ico_of_antitone_monotone
statement: lemma integral_le_sum_mul_Ico_of_antitone_monotone (hab : a ≤ b) (hf : AntitoneOn f (Icc a b)) (hg : MonotoneOn g (Icc (a - 1) (b - 1))) (fpos : 0 ≤ f b) (gpos : 0 ≤ g (a - 1)) : ∫ x in a..b, f x * g (x - 1) ≤ ∑ i ∈ Finset.Ico a b, f i * g i
proof:
apply integral_le_sum_Ico_of_le (f := fun x ↦ f x * g x) hab
· intro i hi x hx
simp only [Nat.cast_add, Nat.cast_one, mem_Ico] at hx hi
have I0 : (i : ℝ) ≤ b - 1 := by
simp only [le_sub_iff_add_le]
norm_cast
lia
have I1 : (i : ℝ) ∈ Icc (a - 1 : ℝ) (b - 1) := by
simp only [mem_Icc, tsub_le_iff_right]
exact ⟨by norm_cast; lia, I0⟩
have I2 : x ∈ Icc (a : ℝ) b := by
refine ⟨le_trans (mod_cast hi.1) hx.1, hx.2.le.trans ?_⟩
norm_cast
lia
apply mul_le_mul
· apply hf
· simp only [mem_Icc, Nat.cast_le]
exact ⟨hi.1, hi.2.le⟩
· exact I2
· exact hx.1
· apply hg
· simp only [mem_Icc, tsub_le_iff_right, sub_add_cancel]
refine ⟨le_trans (mod_cast hi.1) hx.1, hx.2.le.trans ?_⟩
norm_cast
lia
· exact I1
· simpa [sub_le_iff_le_add] using hx.2.le
· apply gpos.trans
apply hg (by simp [hab]) (by simpa using I2) (by simpa using I2.1)
· apply fpos.trans
apply hf ⟨mod_cast hi.1, mod_cast hi.2.le⟩ (by simpa using hab) (mod_cast hi.2.le)
· apply Integrable.mono_measure _ (Measure.restrict_mono_set _ Ico_subset_Icc_self)
apply Integrable.mul_of_top_left
· exact hf.integrableOn_isCompact isCompact_Icc
· apply MonotoneOn.memLp_isCompact isCompact_Icc
intro x hx y hy hxy
apply hg
· simpa using hx
· simpa using hy
· simpa using hxy

name: ext
statement: theorem ext {p q : Seminorm 𝕜 E} (h : ∀ x, (p : E → ℝ) x = q x) : p = q :=

name: coeFnAddMonoidHom_injective
statement: theorem coeFnAddMonoidHom_injective : Function.Injective (coeFnAddMonoidHom 𝕜 E) :=
proof: show @Function.Injective (Seminorm 𝕜 E) (E → ℝ) (↑) from DFunLike.coe_injective

name: smul_sup
statement: theorem smul_sup [SMul R ℝ] [SMul R ℝ≥0] [IsScalarTower R ℝ≥0 ℝ] (r : R) (p q : Seminorm 𝕜 E) : r • (p ⊔ q) = r • p ⊔ r • q :=
proof:
have real.smul_max : ∀ x y : ℝ, r • max x y = max (r • x) (r • y) := fun x y => by
simpa only [← smul_eq_mul, ← NNReal.smul_def, smul_one_smul ℝ≥0 r (_ : ℝ)] using
mul_max_of_nonneg x y (r • (1 : ℝ≥0) : ℝ≥0).coe_nonneg
ext fun _ => real.smul_max _ _

name: coe_le_coe
statement: theorem coe_le_coe {p q : Seminorm 𝕜 E} : (p : E → ℝ) ≤ q ↔ p ≤ q :=

name: coe_lt_coe
statement: theorem coe_lt_coe {p q : Seminorm 𝕜 E} : (p : E → ℝ) < q ↔ p < q :=

name: le_def
statement: theorem le_def {p q : Seminorm 𝕜 E} : p ≤ q ↔ ∀ x, p x ≤ q x :=

name: lt_def
statement: theorem lt_def {p q : Seminorm 𝕜 E} : p < q ↔ p ≤ q ∧ ∃ x, p x < q x :=

name: comp_id
statement: theorem comp_id (p : Seminorm 𝕜 E) : p.comp LinearMap.id = p :=

name: comp_zero
statement: theorem comp_zero (p : Seminorm 𝕜₂ E₂) : p.comp (0 : E →ₛₗ[σ₁₂] E₂) = 0 :=

name: zero_comp
statement: theorem zero_comp (f : E →ₛₗ[σ₁₂] E₂) : (0 : Seminorm 𝕜₂ E₂).comp f = 0 :=

name: comp_comp
statement: theorem comp_comp [RingHomCompTriple σ₁₂ σ₂₃ σ₁₃] (p : Seminorm 𝕜₃ E₃) (g : E₂ →ₛₗ[σ₂₃] E₃) (f : E →ₛₗ[σ₁₂] E₂) : p.comp (g.comp f) = (p.comp g).comp f :=

name: add_comp
statement: theorem add_comp (p q : Seminorm 𝕜₂ E₂) (f : E →ₛₗ[σ₁₂] E₂) : (p + q).comp f = p.comp f + q.comp f :=

name: comp_add_le
statement: theorem comp_add_le (p : Seminorm 𝕜₂ E₂) (f g : E →ₛₗ[σ₁₂] E₂) : p.comp (f + g) ≤ p.comp f + p.comp g

name: smul_comp
statement: theorem smul_comp (p : Seminorm 𝕜₂ E₂) (f : E →ₛₗ[σ₁₂] E₂) (c : R) : (c • p).comp f = c • p.comp f :=

name: comp_mono
statement: theorem comp_mono {p q : Seminorm 𝕜₂ E₂} (f : E →ₛₗ[σ₁₂] E₂) (hp : p ≤ q) : p.comp f ≤ q.comp f :=

name: smul_le_smul
statement: theorem smul_le_smul {p q : Seminorm 𝕜 E} {a b : ℝ≥0} (hpq : p ≤ q) (hab : a ≤ b) : a • p ≤ b • q
proof:
simp_rw [le_def]
intro x
exact mul_le_mul hab (hpq x) (apply_nonneg p x) (NNReal.coe_nonneg b)

name: finset_sup_apply
statement: theorem finset_sup_apply (p : ι → Seminorm 𝕜 E) (s : Finset ι) (x : E) : s.sup p x = ↑(s.sup fun i => NNReal.mk (p i x) (apply_nonneg (p i) x))
proof:
induction s using Finset.cons_induction_on with
| empty =>
rw [Finset.sup_empty, Finset.sup_empty, coe_bot, _root_.bot_eq_zero, Pi.zero_apply]
norm_cast
| cons a s ha ih =>
rw [Finset.sup_cons, Finset.sup_cons, coe_sup, Pi.sup_apply, NNReal.coe_max, NNReal.coe_mk, ih]

name: exists_apply_eq_finset_sup
statement: theorem exists_apply_eq_finset_sup (p : ι → Seminorm 𝕜 E) {s : Finset ι} (hs : s.Nonempty) (x : E) : ∃ i ∈ s, s.sup p x = p i x
proof:
rcases Finset.exists_mem_eq_sup s hs (fun i ↦ (⟨p i x, apply_nonneg _ _⟩ : ℝ≥0)) with ⟨i, hi, hix⟩
rw [finset_sup_apply]
exact ⟨i, hi, congr_arg _ hix⟩

name: zero_or_exists_apply_eq_finset_sup
statement: theorem zero_or_exists_apply_eq_finset_sup (p : ι → Seminorm 𝕜 E) (s : Finset ι) (x : E) : s.sup p x = 0 ∨ ∃ i ∈ s, s.sup p x = p i x
proof:
rcases Finset.eq_empty_or_nonempty s with (rfl | hs)
· left; rfl
· right; exact exists_apply_eq_finset_sup p hs x

name: finset_sup_smul
statement: theorem finset_sup_smul (p : ι → Seminorm 𝕜 E) (s : Finset ι) (C : ℝ≥0) : s.sup (C • p) = C • s.sup p
proof:
ext x
rw [smul_apply, finset_sup_apply, finset_sup_apply]
symm
exact congr_arg ((↑) : ℝ≥0 → ℝ) (NNReal.mul_finset_sup C s (fun i ↦ ⟨p i x, apply_nonneg _ _⟩))

name: finset_sup_le_sum
statement: theorem finset_sup_le_sum (p : ι → Seminorm 𝕜 E) (s : Finset ι) : s.sup p ≤ ∑ i ∈ s, p i
proof:
classical
refine Finset.sup_le_iff.mpr ?_
intro i hi
rw [Finset.sum_eq_sum_diff_singleton_add hi, le_add_iff_nonneg_left]
exact bot_le

name: finset_sup_apply_le
statement: theorem finset_sup_apply_le {p : ι → Seminorm 𝕜 E} {s : Finset ι} {x : E} {a : ℝ} (ha : 0 ≤ a) (h : ∀ i, i ∈ s → p i x ≤ a) : s.sup p x ≤ a
proof:
lift a to ℝ≥0 using ha
rw [finset_sup_apply, NNReal.coe_le_coe]
exact Finset.sup_le h

name: le_finset_sup_apply
statement: theorem le_finset_sup_apply {p : ι → Seminorm 𝕜 E} {s : Finset ι} {x : E} {i : ι} (hi : i ∈ s) : p i x ≤ s.sup p x :=
proof: (Finset.le_sup hi : p i ≤ s.sup p) x

name: finset_sup_apply_lt
statement: theorem finset_sup_apply_lt {p : ι → Seminorm 𝕜 E} {s : Finset ι} {x : E} {a : ℝ} (ha : 0 < a) (h : ∀ i, i ∈ s → p i x < a) : s.sup p x < a
proof:
lift a to ℝ≥0 using ha.le
rw [finset_sup_apply, NNReal.coe_lt_coe, Finset.sup_lt_iff]
· exact h
· exact NNReal.coe_pos.mpr ha

name: norm_sub_map_le_sub
statement: theorem norm_sub_map_le_sub (p : Seminorm 𝕜 E) (x y : E) : ‖p x - p y‖ ≤ p (x - y) :=

name: comp_smul
statement: theorem comp_smul (p : Seminorm 𝕜₂ E₂) (f : E →ₛₗ[σ₁₂] E₂) (c : 𝕜₂) : p.comp (c • f) = ‖c‖₊ • p.comp f :=
proof:
ext fun _ => by
rw [comp_apply, smul_apply, LinearMap.smul_apply, map_smul_eq_mul, NNReal.smul_def, coe_nnnorm,
smul_eq_mul, comp_apply]

name: comp_smul_apply
statement: theorem comp_smul_apply (p : Seminorm 𝕜₂ E₂) (f : E →ₛₗ[σ₁₂] E₂) (c : 𝕜₂) (x : E) : p.comp (c • f) x = ‖c‖ * p (f x) :=

name: bddBelow_range_add
statement: theorem bddBelow_range_add : BddBelow (range fun u => p u + q (x - u)) :=

name: smul_inf
statement: theorem smul_inf [SMul R ℝ] [SMul R ℝ≥0] [IsScalarTower R ℝ≥0 ℝ] (r : R) (p q : Seminorm 𝕜 E) : r • (p ⊓ q) = r • p ⊓ r • q
proof:
ext
simp_rw [smul_apply, inf_apply, smul_apply, ← smul_one_smul ℝ≥0 r (_ : ℝ), NNReal.smul_def,
smul_eq_mul, Real.mul_iInf_of_nonneg (NNReal.coe_nonneg _), mul_add]

name: mem_ball
statement: theorem mem_ball : y ∈ ball p x r ↔ p (y - x) < r :=

name: mem_closedBall
statement: theorem mem_closedBall : y ∈ closedBall p x r ↔ p (y - x) ≤ r :=

name: mem_ball_self
statement: theorem mem_ball_self (hr : 0 < r) : x ∈ ball p x r

name: mem_closedBall_self
statement: theorem mem_closedBall_self (hr : 0 ≤ r) : x ∈ closedBall p x r

name: mem_ball_zero
statement: theorem mem_ball_zero : y ∈ ball p 0 r ↔ p y < r

name: mem_closedBall_zero
statement: theorem mem_closedBall_zero : y ∈ closedBall p 0 r ↔ p y ≤ r

name: ball_zero_eq
statement: theorem ball_zero_eq : ball p 0 r = { y : E | p y < r } :=

name: closedBall_zero_eq
statement: theorem closedBall_zero_eq : closedBall p 0 r = { y : E | p y ≤ r } :=

name: ball_subset_closedBall
statement: theorem ball_subset_closedBall (x r) : ball p x r ⊆ closedBall p x r

name: closedBall_eq_biInter_ball
statement: theorem closedBall_eq_biInter_ball (x r) : closedBall p x r = ⋂ ρ > r, ball p x ρ
proof: ext y; simp_rw [mem_closedBall, mem_iInter₂, mem_ball, ← forall_gt_iff_le]

name: ball_zero
statement: theorem ball_zero' (x : E) (hr : 0 < r) : ball (0 : Seminorm 𝕜 E) x r = Set.univ

name: closedBall_zero
statement: theorem closedBall_zero' (x : E) (hr : 0 < r) : closedBall (0 : Seminorm 𝕜 E) x r = Set.univ :=

name: ball_smul
statement: theorem ball_smul (p : Seminorm 𝕜 E) {c : NNReal} (hc : 0 < c) (r : ℝ) (x : E) : (c • p).ball x r = p.ball x (r / c)
proof:
ext
rw [mem_ball, mem_ball, smul_apply, NNReal.smul_def, smul_eq_mul, mul_comm,
lt_div_iff₀ (NNReal.coe_pos.mpr hc)]

name: closedBall_smul
statement: theorem closedBall_smul (p : Seminorm 𝕜 E) {c : NNReal} (hc : 0 < c) (r : ℝ) (x : E) : (c • p).closedBall x r = p.closedBall x (r / c)
proof:
ext
rw [mem_closedBall, mem_closedBall, smul_apply, NNReal.smul_def, smul_eq_mul, mul_comm,
le_div_iff₀ (NNReal.coe_pos.mpr hc)]

name: ball_sup
statement: theorem ball_sup (p : Seminorm 𝕜 E) (q : Seminorm 𝕜 E) (e : E) (r : ℝ) : ball (p ⊔ q) e r = ball p e r ∩ ball q e r

name: closedBall_sup
statement: theorem closedBall_sup (p : Seminorm 𝕜 E) (q : Seminorm 𝕜 E) (e : E) (r : ℝ) : closedBall (p ⊔ q) e r = closedBall p e r ∩ closedBall q e r

name: ball_finset_sup
statement: theorem ball_finset_sup' (p : ι → Seminorm 𝕜 E) (s : Finset ι) (H : s.Nonempty) (e : E) (r : ℝ) : ball (s.sup' H p) e r = s.inf' H fun i => ball (p i) e r
proof:
induction H using Finset.Nonempty.cons_induction with
| singleton => simp
| cons _ _ _ hs ih =>
simp only [Finset.sup'_cons hs, Finset.inf'_cons hs, ball_sup, inf_eq_inter, ih]

name: closedBall_finset_sup
statement: theorem closedBall_finset_sup' (p : ι → Seminorm 𝕜 E) (s : Finset ι) (H : s.Nonempty) (e : E) (r : ℝ) : closedBall (s.sup' H p) e r = s.inf' H fun i => closedBall (p i) e r
proof:
induction H using Finset.Nonempty.cons_induction with
| singleton => simp
| cons _ _ _ hs ih =>
simp only [Finset.sup'_cons hs, Finset.inf'_cons hs, closedBall_sup, inf_eq_inter, ih]

name: ball_mono
statement: theorem ball_mono {p : Seminorm 𝕜 E} {r₁ r₂ : ℝ} (h : r₁ ≤ r₂) : p.ball x r₁ ⊆ p.ball x r₂ :=

name: closedBall_mono
statement: theorem closedBall_mono {p : Seminorm 𝕜 E} {r₁ r₂ : ℝ} (h : r₁ ≤ r₂) : p.closedBall x r₁ ⊆ p.closedBall x r₂

name: ball_antitone
statement: theorem ball_antitone {p q : Seminorm 𝕜 E} (h : q ≤ p) : p.ball x r ⊆ q.ball x r

name: closedBall_antitone
statement: theorem closedBall_antitone {p q : Seminorm 𝕜 E} (h : q ≤ p) : p.closedBall x r ⊆ q.closedBall x r

name: ball_add_ball_subset
statement: theorem ball_add_ball_subset (p : Seminorm 𝕜 E) (r₁ r₂ : ℝ) (x₁ x₂ : E) : p.ball (x₁ : E) r₁ + p.ball (x₂ : E) r₂ ⊆ p.ball (x₁ + x₂) (r₁ + r₂)
proof:
rintro x ⟨y₁, hy₁, y₂, hy₂, rfl⟩
rw [mem_ball, add_sub_add_comm]
exact (map_add_le_add p _ _).trans_lt (add_lt_add hy₁ hy₂)

name: closedBall_add_closedBall_subset
statement: theorem closedBall_add_closedBall_subset (p : Seminorm 𝕜 E) (r₁ r₂ : ℝ) (x₁ x₂ : E) : p.closedBall (x₁ : E) r₁ + p.closedBall (x₂ : E) r₂ ⊆ p.closedBall (x₁ + x₂) (r₁ + r₂)
proof:
rintro x ⟨y₁, hy₁, y₂, hy₂, rfl⟩
rw [mem_closedBall, add_sub_add_comm]
exact (map_add_le_add p _ _).trans (add_le_add hy₁ hy₂)

name: sub_mem_ball
statement: theorem sub_mem_ball (p : Seminorm 𝕜 E) (x₁ x₂ y : E) (r : ℝ) : x₁ - x₂ ∈ p.ball y r ↔ x₁ ∈ p.ball (x₂ + y) r

name: sub_mem_closedBall
statement: theorem sub_mem_closedBall (p : Seminorm 𝕜 E) (x₁ x₂ y : E) (r : ℝ) : x₁ - x₂ ∈ p.closedBall y r ↔ x₁ ∈ p.closedBall (x₂ + y) r

name: ball_eq_metric
statement: lemma ball_eq_metric : letI
proof:
AddGroupSeminorm.toSeminormedAddCommGroup p.toAddGroupSeminorm
p.ball x r = Metric.ball x r := by
ext
simp only [mem_ball_iff_norm]
rfl

name: closedBall_eq_metric
statement: lemma closedBall_eq_metric : letI
proof:
AddGroupSeminorm.toSeminormedAddCommGroup p.toAddGroupSeminorm
p.closedBall x r = Metric.closedBall x r := by
ext
simp only [mem_closedBall_iff_norm]
rfl

name: vadd_ball
statement: theorem vadd_ball (p : Seminorm 𝕜 E) : x +ᵥ p.ball y r = p.ball (x +ᵥ y) r

name: vadd_closedBall
statement: theorem vadd_closedBall (p : Seminorm 𝕜 E) : x +ᵥ p.closedBall y r = p.closedBall (x +ᵥ y) r

name: ball_comp
statement: theorem ball_comp (p : Seminorm 𝕜₂ E₂) (f : E →ₛₗ[σ₁₂] E₂) (x : E) (r : ℝ) : (p.comp f).ball x r = f ⁻¹' p.ball (f x) r
proof:
ext
simp_rw [ball, mem_preimage, comp_apply, Set.mem_setOf_eq, map_sub]

name: closedBall_comp
statement: theorem closedBall_comp (p : Seminorm 𝕜₂ E₂) (f : E →ₛₗ[σ₁₂] E₂) (x : E) (r : ℝ) : (p.comp f).closedBall x r = f ⁻¹' p.closedBall (f x) r
proof:
ext
simp_rw [closedBall, mem_preimage, comp_apply, Set.mem_setOf_eq, map_sub]

name: preimage_metric_ball
statement: theorem preimage_metric_ball {r : ℝ} : p ⁻¹' Metric.ball 0 r = { x | p x < r }
proof:
ext x
simp only [mem_setOf, mem_preimage, mem_ball_zero_iff, Real.norm_of_nonneg (apply_nonneg p _)]

name: preimage_metric_closedBall
statement: theorem preimage_metric_closedBall {r : ℝ} : p ⁻¹' Metric.closedBall 0 r = { x | p x ≤ r }
proof:
ext x
simp only [mem_setOf, mem_preimage, mem_closedBall_zero_iff,
Real.norm_of_nonneg (apply_nonneg p _)]

name: ball_zero_eq_preimage_ball
statement: theorem ball_zero_eq_preimage_ball {r : ℝ} : p.ball 0 r = p ⁻¹' Metric.ball 0 r

name: closedBall_zero_eq_preimage_closedBall
statement: theorem closedBall_zero_eq_preimage_closedBall {r : ℝ} : p.closedBall 0 r = p ⁻¹' Metric.closedBall 0 r

name: ball_bot
statement: theorem ball_bot {r : ℝ} (x : E) (hr : 0 < r) : ball (⊥ : Seminorm 𝕜 E) x r = Set.univ :=

name: closedBall_bot
statement: theorem closedBall_bot {r : ℝ} (x : E) (hr : 0 < r) : closedBall (⊥ : Seminorm 𝕜 E) x r = Set.univ :=

name: balanced_ball_zero
statement: theorem balanced_ball_zero (r : ℝ) : Balanced 𝕜 (ball p 0 r)
proof:
rintro a ha x ⟨y, hy, hx⟩
rw [mem_ball_zero, ← hx, map_smul_eq_mul]
calc
_ ≤ p y := mul_le_of_le_one_left (apply_nonneg p _) ha
_ < r := by rwa [mem_ball_zero] at hy

name: balanced_closedBall_zero
statement: theorem balanced_closedBall_zero (r : ℝ) : Balanced 𝕜 (closedBall p 0 r)
proof:
rintro a ha x ⟨y, hy, hx⟩
rw [mem_closedBall_zero, ← hx, map_smul_eq_mul]
calc
_ ≤ p y := mul_le_of_le_one_left (apply_nonneg p _) ha
_ ≤ r := by rwa [mem_closedBall_zero] at hy

name: ball_finset_sup_eq_iInter
statement: theorem ball_finset_sup_eq_iInter (p : ι → Seminorm 𝕜 E) (s : Finset ι) (x : E) {r : ℝ} (hr : 0 < r) : ball (s.sup p) x r = ⋂ i ∈ s, ball (p i) x r
proof:
lift r to NNReal using hr.le
simp_rw [ball, iInter_setOf, finset_sup_apply, NNReal.coe_lt_coe,
Finset.sup_lt_iff (show ⊥ < r from hr), ← NNReal.coe_lt_coe, NNReal.coe_mk]

name: closedBall_finset_sup_eq_iInter
statement: theorem closedBall_finset_sup_eq_iInter (p : ι → Seminorm 𝕜 E) (s : Finset ι) (x : E) {r : ℝ} (hr : 0 ≤ r) : closedBall (s.sup p) x r = ⋂ i ∈ s, closedBall (p i) x r
proof:
lift r to NNReal using hr
simp_rw [closedBall, iInter_setOf, finset_sup_apply, NNReal.coe_le_coe, Finset.sup_le_iff, ←
NNReal.coe_le_coe, NNReal.coe_mk]

name: ball_finset_sup
statement: theorem ball_finset_sup (p : ι → Seminorm 𝕜 E) (s : Finset ι) (x : E) {r : ℝ} (hr : 0 < r) : ball (s.sup p) x r = s.inf fun i => ball (p i) x r

name: closedBall_finset_sup
statement: theorem closedBall_finset_sup (p : ι → Seminorm 𝕜 E) (s : Finset ι) (x : E) {r : ℝ} (hr : 0 ≤ r) : closedBall (s.sup p) x r = s.inf fun i => closedBall (p i) x r

name: ball_eq_emptyset
statement: theorem ball_eq_emptyset (p : Seminorm 𝕜 E) {x : E} {r : ℝ} (hr : r ≤ 0) : p.ball x r = ∅
proof:
ext
rw [Seminorm.mem_ball, Set.mem_empty_iff_false, iff_false, not_lt]
exact hr.trans (apply_nonneg p _)

name: closedBall_eq_emptyset
statement: theorem closedBall_eq_emptyset (p : Seminorm 𝕜 E) {x : E} {r : ℝ} (hr : r < 0) : p.closedBall x r = ∅
proof:
ext
rw [Seminorm.mem_closedBall, Set.mem_empty_iff_false, iff_false, not_le]
exact hr.trans_le (apply_nonneg _ _)

name: closedBall_smul_ball
statement: theorem closedBall_smul_ball (p : Seminorm 𝕜 E) {r₁ : ℝ} (hr₁ : r₁ ≠ 0) (r₂ : ℝ) : Metric.closedBall (0 : 𝕜) r₁ • p.ball 0 r₂ ⊆ p.ball 0 (r₁ * r₂)
proof:
simp only [smul_subset_iff, mem_ball_zero, mem_closedBall_zero_iff, map_smul_eq_mul]
refine fun a ha b hb ↦ mul_lt_mul' ha hb (apply_nonneg _ _) ?_
exact hr₁.lt_or_gt.resolve_left <| ((norm_nonneg a).trans ha).not_gt

name: ball_smul_closedBall
statement: theorem ball_smul_closedBall (p : Seminorm 𝕜 E) (r₁ : ℝ) {r₂ : ℝ} (hr₂ : r₂ ≠ 0) : Metric.ball (0 : 𝕜) r₁ • p.closedBall 0 r₂ ⊆ p.ball 0 (r₁ * r₂)
proof:
simp only [smul_subset_iff, mem_ball_zero, mem_closedBall_zero, mem_ball_zero_iff,
map_smul_eq_mul]
intro a ha b hb
rw [mul_comm, mul_comm r₁]
refine mul_lt_mul' hb ha (norm_nonneg _) (hr₂.lt_or_gt.resolve_left ?_)
exact ((apply_nonneg p b).trans hb).not_gt

name: ball_smul_ball
statement: theorem ball_smul_ball (p : Seminorm 𝕜 E) (r₁ r₂ : ℝ) : Metric.ball (0 : 𝕜) r₁ • p.ball 0 r₂ ⊆ p.ball 0 (r₁ * r₂)
proof:
rcases eq_or_ne r₂ 0 with rfl | hr₂
· simp
· exact (smul_subset_smul_left (ball_subset_closedBall _ _ _)).trans
(ball_smul_closedBall _ _ hr₂)

name: closedBall_smul_closedBall
statement: theorem closedBall_smul_closedBall (p : Seminorm 𝕜 E) (r₁ r₂ : ℝ) : Metric.closedBall (0 : 𝕜) r₁ • p.closedBall 0 r₂ ⊆ p.closedBall 0 (r₁ * r₂)
proof:
simp only [smul_subset_iff, mem_closedBall_zero, mem_closedBall_zero_iff, map_smul_eq_mul]
intro a ha b hb
gcongr
exact (norm_nonneg _).trans ha

name: neg_mem_ball_zero
statement: theorem neg_mem_ball_zero {r : ℝ} {x : E} : -x ∈ ball p 0 r ↔ x ∈ ball p 0 r

name: neg_mem_closedBall_zero
statement: theorem neg_mem_closedBall_zero {r : ℝ} {x : E} : -x ∈ closedBall p 0 r ↔ x ∈ closedBall p 0 r

name: neg_ball
statement: theorem neg_ball (p : Seminorm 𝕜 E) (r : ℝ) (x : E) : -ball p x r = ball p (-x) r
proof:
ext
rw [Set.mem_neg, mem_ball, mem_ball, ← neg_add', sub_neg_eq_add, map_neg_eq_map]

name: neg_closedBall
statement: theorem neg_closedBall (p : Seminorm 𝕜 E) (r : ℝ) (x : E) : -closedBall p x r = closedBall p (-x) r
proof:
ext
rw [Set.mem_neg, mem_closedBall, mem_closedBall, ← neg_add', sub_neg_eq_add, map_neg_eq_map]

name: closedBall_iSup
statement: theorem closedBall_iSup {ι : Sort*} {p : ι → Seminorm 𝕜 E} (hp : BddAbove (range p)) (e : E) {r : ℝ} (hr : 0 < r) : closedBall (⨆ i, p i) e r = ⋂ i, closedBall (p i) e r
proof:
cases isEmpty_or_nonempty ι
· rw [iSup_of_empty', iInter_of_empty, Seminorm.sSup_empty]
exact closedBall_bot _ hr
· ext x
have := Seminorm.bddAbove_range_iff.mp hp (x - e)
simp only [mem_closedBall, mem_iInter, Seminorm.iSup_apply hp, ciSup_le_iff this]

name: ball_norm_mul_subset
statement: theorem ball_norm_mul_subset {p : Seminorm 𝕜 E} {k : 𝕜} {r : ℝ} : p.ball 0 (‖k‖ * r) ⊆ k • p.ball 0 r
proof:
rcases eq_or_ne k 0 with (rfl | hk)
· rw [norm_zero, zero_mul, ball_eq_emptyset _ le_rfl]
exact empty_subset _
· intro x
rw [Set.mem_smul_set, Seminorm.mem_ball_zero]
refine fun hx => ⟨k⁻¹ • x, ?_, ?_⟩
· rwa [Seminorm.mem_ball_zero, map_smul_eq_mul, norm_inv, ←
mul_lt_mul_iff_right₀ <| norm_pos_iff.mpr hk, ← mul_assoc, ← div_eq_mul_inv ‖k‖ ‖k‖,
div_self (ne_of_gt <| norm_pos_iff.mpr hk), one_mul]
rw [← smul_assoc, smul_eq_mul, ← div_eq_mul_inv, div_self hk, one_smul]

name: smul_ball_zero
statement: theorem smul_ball_zero {p : Seminorm 𝕜 E} {k : 𝕜} {r : ℝ} (hk : k ≠ 0) : k • p.ball 0 r = p.ball 0 (‖k‖ * r)
proof:
ext
rw [mem_smul_set_iff_inv_smul_mem₀ hk, p.mem_ball_zero, p.mem_ball_zero, map_smul_eq_mul,
norm_inv, ← div_eq_inv_mul, div_lt_iff₀ (norm_pos_iff.2 hk), mul_comm]

name: smul_closedBall_subset
statement: theorem smul_closedBall_subset {p : Seminorm 𝕜 E} {k : 𝕜} {r : ℝ} : k • p.closedBall 0 r ⊆ p.closedBall 0 (‖k‖ * r)
proof:
rintro x ⟨y, hy, h⟩
rw [Seminorm.mem_closedBall_zero, ← h, map_smul_eq_mul]
rw [Seminorm.mem_closedBall_zero] at hy
gcongr

name: smul_closedBall_zero
statement: theorem smul_closedBall_zero {p : Seminorm 𝕜 E} {k : 𝕜} {r : ℝ} (hk : 0 < ‖k‖) : k • p.closedBall 0 r = p.closedBall 0 (‖k‖ * r)
proof:
refine subset_antisymm smul_closedBall_subset ?_
intro x
rw [Set.mem_smul_set, Seminorm.mem_closedBall_zero]
refine fun hx => ⟨k⁻¹ • x, ?_, ?_⟩
· rwa [Seminorm.mem_closedBall_zero, map_smul_eq_mul, norm_inv, inv_mul_le_iff₀ hk]
rw [← smul_assoc, smul_eq_mul, ← div_eq_mul_inv, div_self (norm_pos_iff.mp hk), one_smul]

name: ball_zero_absorbs_ball_zero
statement: theorem ball_zero_absorbs_ball_zero (p : Seminorm 𝕜 E) {r₁ r₂ : ℝ} (hr₁ : 0 < r₁) : Absorbs 𝕜 (p.ball 0 r₁) (p.ball 0 r₂)
proof:
rcases exists_pos_lt_mul hr₁ r₂ with ⟨r, hr₀, hr⟩
refine .of_norm ⟨r, fun a ha x hx => ?_⟩
rw [smul_ball_zero (norm_pos_iff.1 <| hr₀.trans_le ha), p.mem_ball_zero]
rw [p.mem_ball_zero] at hx
exact hx.trans (hr.trans_le <| by gcongr)

name: smul_ball_preimage
statement: theorem smul_ball_preimage (p : Seminorm 𝕜 E) (y : E) (r : ℝ) (a : 𝕜) (ha : a ≠ 0) : (a • ·) ⁻¹' p.ball y r = p.ball (a⁻¹ • y) (r / ‖a‖) :=
proof:
Set.ext fun _ => by
rw [mem_preimage, mem_ball, mem_ball, lt_div_iff₀ (norm_pos_iff.mpr ha), mul_comm, ←
map_smul_eq_mul p, smul_sub, smul_inv_smul₀ ha]

name: smul_closedBall_preimage
statement: theorem smul_closedBall_preimage (p : Seminorm 𝕜 E) (y : E) (r : ℝ) (a : 𝕜) (ha : a ≠ 0) : (a • ·) ⁻¹' p.closedBall y r = p.closedBall (a⁻¹ • y) (r / ‖a‖) :=
proof:
Set.ext fun _ => by
rw [mem_preimage, mem_closedBall, mem_closedBall, le_div_iff₀ (norm_pos_iff.mpr ha), mul_comm, ←
map_smul_eq_mul p, smul_sub, smul_inv_smul₀ ha]

name: convex_ball
statement: theorem convex_ball : Convex ℝ (ball p x r)
proof:
convert (p.convexOn.translate_left (-x)).convex_lt r
ext y
rw [preimage_univ, sep_univ, p.mem_ball, sub_eq_add_neg]
rfl

name: convex_closedBall
statement: theorem convex_closedBall : Convex ℝ (closedBall p x r)

name: continuousAt_zero_of_forall
statement: theorem continuousAt_zero_of_forall' [TopologicalSpace E] {p : Seminorm 𝕝 E} (hp : ∀ r > 0, p.closedBall 0 r ∈ (𝓝 0 : Filter E)) : ContinuousAt p 0

name: continuousAt_zero
statement: theorem continuousAt_zero' [TopologicalSpace E] [ContinuousConstSMul 𝕜 E] {p : Seminorm 𝕜 E} {r : ℝ} (hp : p.closedBall 0 r ∈ (𝓝 0 : Filter E)) : ContinuousAt p 0
proof:
refine continuousAt_zero_of_forall' fun ε hε ↦ ?_
obtain ⟨k, hk₀, hk⟩ : ∃ k : 𝕜, 0 < ‖k‖ ∧ ‖k‖ * r < ε := by
rcases le_or_gt r 0 with hr | hr
· use 1; simpa using hr.trans_lt hε
· simpa [lt_div_iff₀ hr] using exists_norm_lt 𝕜 (div_pos hε hr)
grw [← hk]
rwa [← set_smul_mem_nhds_zero_iff (norm_pos_iff.1 hk₀), smul_closedBall_zero hk₀] at hp

name: continuousAt_zero_of_forall
statement: theorem continuousAt_zero_of_forall [TopologicalSpace E] {p : Seminorm 𝕝 E} (hp : ∀ r > 0, p.ball 0 r ∈ (𝓝 0 : Filter E)) : ContinuousAt p 0 :=
proof:
continuousAt_zero_of_forall'
(fun r hr ↦ Filter.mem_of_superset (hp r hr) <| p.ball_subset_closedBall _ _)

name: continuousAt_zero
statement: theorem continuousAt_zero [TopologicalSpace E] [ContinuousConstSMul 𝕜 E] {p : Seminorm 𝕜 E} {r : ℝ} (hp : p.ball 0 r ∈ (𝓝 0 : Filter E)) : ContinuousAt p 0 :=

name: continuous_of_le
statement: theorem continuous_of_le [TopologicalSpace E] [IsTopologicalAddGroup E] {p q : Seminorm 𝕝 E} (hq : Continuous q) (hpq : p ≤ q) : Continuous p
proof:
refine Seminorm.continuous_of_forall (fun r hr ↦ Filter.mem_of_superset
(IsOpen.mem_nhds ?_ <| q.mem_ball_self hr) (ball_antitone hpq))
rw [ball_zero_eq]
exact isOpen_lt hq continuous_const

name: ball_mem_nhds
statement: lemma ball_mem_nhds [TopologicalSpace E] {p : Seminorm 𝕝 E} (hp : Continuous p) {r : ℝ} (hr : 0 < r) : p.ball 0 r ∈ (𝓝 0 : Filter E)
proof:
have this : Tendsto p (𝓝 0) (𝓝 0) := map_zero p ▸ hp.tendsto 0
simpa only [p.ball_zero_eq] using this (Iio_mem_nhds hr)

name: uniformSpace_eq_of_hasBasis
statement: lemma uniformSpace_eq_of_hasBasis {ι} [UniformSpace E] [IsUniformAddGroup E] [ContinuousConstSMul 𝕜 E] {p' : ι → Prop} {s : ι → Set E} (p : Seminorm 𝕜 E) (hb : (𝓝 0 : Filter E).HasBasis p' s) (h₁ : ∃ r, p.closedBall 0 r ∈ 𝓝 0) (h₂ : ∀ i, p' i → ∃ r > 0, p.ball 0 r ⊆ s i) : ‹UniformSpace E› = p.toAddGroupSeminorm.toSeminormedAddGroup.toUniformSpace
proof:
refine IsUniformAddGroup.ext ‹_›
p.toAddGroupSeminorm.toSeminormedAddCommGroup.to_isUniformAddGroup ?_
apply le_antisymm
· rw [← @comap_norm_nhds_zero E p.toAddGroupSeminorm.toSeminormedAddGroup, ← tendsto_iff_comap]
suffices Continuous p from this.tendsto' 0 _ (map_zero p)
rcases h₁ with ⟨r, hr⟩
exact p.continuous' hr
· rw [(@NormedAddGroup.nhds_zero_basis_norm_lt E
p.toAddGroupSeminorm.toSeminormedAddGroup).le_basis_iff hb]
simpa only [subset_def, mem_ball_zero] using h₂

name: uniformity_eq_of_hasBasis
statement: lemma uniformity_eq_of_hasBasis {ι} [UniformSpace E] [IsUniformAddGroup E] [ContinuousConstSMul 𝕜 E] {p' : ι → Prop} {s : ι → Set E} (p : Seminorm 𝕜 E) (hb : (𝓝 0 : Filter E).HasBasis p' s) (h₁ : ∃ r, p.closedBall 0 r ∈ 𝓝 0) (h₂ : ∀ i, p' i → ∃ r > 0, p.ball 0 r ⊆ s i) : 𝓤 E = ⨅ r > 0, 𝓟 {x | p (x.1 - x.2) < r}
proof:
rw [uniformSpace_eq_of_hasBasis p hb h₁ h₂]
simp only [sub_eq_add_neg, ← map_neg_add p]
rfl

name: rescale_to_shell_zpow
statement: lemma rescale_to_shell_zpow (p : Seminorm 𝕜 E) {c : 𝕜} (hc : 1 < ‖c‖) {ε : ℝ} (εpos : 0 < ε) {x : E} (hx : p x ≠ 0) : ∃ n : ℤ, c ^ n ≠ 0 ∧ p (c ^ n • x) < ε ∧ (ε / ‖c‖ ≤ p (c ^ n • x)) ∧ (‖c ^ n‖⁻¹ ≤ ε⁻¹ * ‖c‖ * p x)
proof:
have xεpos : 0 < (p x) / ε := by positivity
rcases exists_mem_Ico_zpow xεpos hc with ⟨n, hn⟩
have cpos : 0 < ‖c‖ := by positivity
have cnpos : 0 < ‖c ^ (n + 1)‖ := by rw [norm_zpow]; exact xεpos.trans hn.2
refine ⟨-(n + 1), ?_, ?_, ?_, ?_⟩
· show c ^ (-(n + 1)) ≠ 0; exact zpow_ne_zero _ (norm_pos_iff.1 cpos)
· show p ((c ^ (-(n + 1))) • x) < ε
rw [map_smul_eq_mul, zpow_neg, norm_inv, ← div_eq_inv_mul, div_lt_iff₀ cnpos, mul_comm,
norm_zpow]
exact (div_lt_iff₀ εpos).1 (hn.2)
· show ε / ‖c‖ ≤ p (c ^ (-(n + 1)) • x)
rw [zpow_neg, div_le_iff₀ cpos, map_smul_eq_mul, norm_inv, norm_zpow, zpow_add₀ (ne_of_gt cpos),
zpow_one, mul_inv_rev, mul_comm, ← mul_assoc, ← mul_assoc, mul_inv_cancel₀ (ne_of_gt cpos),
one_mul, ← div_eq_inv_mul, le_div_iff₀ (zpow_pos cpos _), mul_comm]
exact (le_div_iff₀ εpos).1 hn.1
· show ‖(c ^ (-(n + 1)))‖⁻¹ ≤ ε⁻¹ * ‖c‖ * p x
have : ε⁻¹ * ‖c‖ * p x = ε⁻¹ * p x * ‖c‖ := by ring
rw [zpow_neg, norm_inv, inv_inv, norm_zpow, zpow_add₀ (ne_of_gt cpos), zpow_one, this,
← div_eq_inv_mul]
gcongr; exact hn.1

name: bound_of_shell
statement: lemma bound_of_shell (p q : Seminorm 𝕜 E) {ε C : ℝ} (ε_pos : 0 < ε) {c : 𝕜} (hc : 1 < ‖c‖) (hf : ∀ x, ε / ‖c‖ ≤ p x → p x < ε → q x ≤ C * p x) {x : E} (hx : p x ≠ 0) : q x ≤ C * p x
proof:
rcases p.rescale_to_shell hc ε_pos hx with ⟨δ, hδ, δxle, leδx, -⟩
simpa only [map_smul_eq_mul, mul_left_comm C, mul_le_mul_iff_right₀ (norm_pos_iff.2 hδ)]
using hf (δ • x) leδx δxle

name: bound_of_shell_smul
statement: lemma bound_of_shell_smul (p q : Seminorm 𝕜 E) {ε : ℝ} {C : ℝ≥0} (ε_pos : 0 < ε) {c : 𝕜} (hc : 1 < ‖c‖) (hf : ∀ x, ε / ‖c‖ ≤ p x → p x < ε → q x ≤ (C • p) x) {x : E} (hx : p x ≠ 0) : q x ≤ (C • p) x :=
proof: Seminorm.bound_of_shell p q ε_pos hc hf hx

name: bound_of_shell_sup
statement: lemma bound_of_shell_sup (p : ι → Seminorm 𝕜 E) (s : Finset ι) (q : Seminorm 𝕜 E) {ε : ℝ} {C : ℝ≥0} (ε_pos : 0 < ε) {c : 𝕜} (hc : 1 < ‖c‖) (hf : ∀ x, (∀ i ∈ s, p i x < ε) → ∀ j ∈ s, ε / ‖c‖ ≤ p j x → q x ≤ (C • p j) x) {x : E} (hx : ∃ j, j ∈ s ∧ p j x ≠ 0) : q x ≤ (C • s.sup p) x
proof:
rcases hx with ⟨j, hj, hjx⟩
have : (s.sup p) x ≠ 0 :=
ne_of_gt ((hjx.symm.lt_of_le <| apply_nonneg _ _).trans_le (le_finset_sup_apply hj))
refine (s.sup p).bound_of_shell_smul q ε_pos hc (fun y hle hlt ↦ ?_) this
rcases exists_apply_eq_finset_sup p ⟨j, hj⟩ y with ⟨i, hi, hiy⟩
rw [smul_apply, hiy]
exact hf y (fun k hk ↦ (le_finset_sup_apply hk).trans_lt hlt) i hi (hiy ▸ hle)

name: bddAbove_of_absorbent
statement: lemma bddAbove_of_absorbent {ι : Sort*} {p : ι → Seminorm 𝕜 E} {s : Set E} (hs : Absorbent 𝕜 s) (h : ∀ x ∈ s, BddAbove (range (p · x))) : BddAbove (range p)
proof:
rw [Seminorm.bddAbove_range_iff]
intro x
obtain ⟨c, hc₀, hc⟩ : ∃ c ≠ 0, (c : 𝕜) • x ∈ s :=
(eventually_mem_nhdsWithin.and (hs.eventually_nhdsNE_zero x)).exists
rcases h _ hc with ⟨M, hM⟩
refine ⟨M / ‖c‖, forall_mem_range.mpr fun i ↦ (le_div_iff₀' (norm_pos_iff.2 hc₀)).2 ?_⟩
exact hM ⟨i, map_smul_eq_mul ..⟩

name: ball_normSeminorm
statement: theorem ball_normSeminorm : (normSeminorm 𝕜 E).ball = Metric.ball
proof:
ext x r y
simp only [Seminorm.mem_ball, Metric.mem_ball, coe_normSeminorm, dist_eq_norm]

QuaternionAlgebra.reₗ _ _ _)
